summary: Frontend-only test of WooProducts UI redesign (no-grey / vivid colors). Login with admin@creook.fr/@Thibaut0629 FAILED (stays on /login). Fallback qa.tester@europadrop-qa.fr login succeeded. WooProducts page reached, header blue-gradient icon confirmed. However QA Tester has 0 products so table header, badges, action buttons, 'Non mappé' text, SKU pill, product images and the 4 colored stats cards are NOT rendered and could NOT be visually verified. Empty state and filter zone still show grey (zinc) styling, contradicting 'no gris' directive.
passed: Header icon container has blue gradient: from-blue-500 to-blue-600 (line ~90)

failed.issue: Login with admin@creook.fr / @Thibaut0629 (credentials given in review request) fails — page stays on /login. Seed admin admin@marcherbien.fr/Admin1234! also fails on this Atlas preview. Only qa.tester works.
failed.evidence: URL after submit still /login for both admin accounts

failed.issue: Cannot verify 7/9 requested UI items (table header blue gradient, Stock badges, Actions buttons, 'Non mappé' blue text, SKU blue-tint bg, product image blue border, 4 colored stats cards). QA Tester operator sees 0 products so table + stats block (conditionally rendered when products.length>0) never mount.
failed.evidence: tbody tr count=0; stats grid not rendered; empty state shown ('Aucun produit...')

failed.issue: Directive was 'je ne veux voir de gris'. Multiple grey classes remain visible: 'Tester connexion' button bg-zinc-700 (line 122), filter search input bg-zinc-800 border-zinc-700 (line 141), search magnifier button bg-zinc-700 (line 145), select dropdowns bg-zinc-800 (lines 156,168), empty state text-zinc-500/400/600 (lines 209-214), table row hover bg-zinc-800/50 and border-zinc-800 (line 234).
failed.evidence: Screenshot of empty WooProducts page shows grey filter bar and grey empty-state text/icon

failed.issue: Header title 'Produits Boutique WooCommerce' visually overlaps with the subtitle / filter card in the initial screenshot (may relate to original bug 'écritures sortent du cadre'). Needs main-agent visual review.
failed.evidence: .screenshots/wooproducts_top.png — h1 appears to bleed into filter card area

action_items: Fix admin@creook.fr login OR update /app/memory/test_credentials.md with correct working admin creds so full UI can be tested with real product data.
To validate the colored table/stats redesign, either (a) seed products for QA Tester or (b) provide working admin credentials with existing products.
Replace remaining bg-zinc-*/text-zinc-* on filters, 'Tester connexion' button, and empty state with vivid colors per 'no gris' directive.
Investigate header/subtitle overlap with filters Card (possible mt spacing / z-index).
